document.title: Claims API idempotency
document.text: Claims API clients send the Idempotency-Key header on create requests. Keys remain valid for a 24 hour replay window. Reusing a key with a different payload returns HTTP 409.

generation.text: The Idempotency-Key header makes Claims API creates idempotent and a key can be replayed for a 24-hour window. The source IDs are [api-idempotency][api-idempotency].
